revenue_segments.name: Transaction Revenue
revenue_segments.commentary: Decrease in consumer transaction revenue driven by a 54% decrease in consumer Trading Volume, offset by growth in derivatives trading volume and the launch of prediction markets trading.

revenue_segments.name: Subscription and Services Revenue
revenue_segments.commentary: Decrease due to lower blockchain rewards and other subscription services, despite an increase in stablecoin revenue.

forward_guidance.text: The company expects continued growth in derivatives and prediction markets, with stablecoin adoption accelerating.

key_risks.description: The company faces risks related to the rapidly changing regulatory environment for crypto assets.

bull_case: Strong growth in derivatives and prediction markets could drive future revenue increases.
bear_case: Significant decline in consumer transaction revenue due to decreased trading volume.
what_to_watch: Regulatory developments affecting crypto assets and trading platforms.
